top3.sql:
WITH industry_counts AS (
  SELECT 
    ci.industry,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE cd.year_founded BETWEEN 2019 AND 2021) AS new_companies_count
  FROM companies_industries ci
  JOIN companies_dates cd ON ci.company_id = cd.company_id
  WHERE cd.year_founded BETWEEN 2019 AND 2021
  GROUP BY ci.industry
  ORDER BY new_companies_count DESC
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT 
  CAST(new_companies_count AS REAL) / 3 AS avg_new_per_year
FROM industry_counts;

WITH industry_counts AS (
  SELECT 
    ci.industry,
    strftime('%Y', cd.date_joined) AS year,
    COUNT(*) AS new_unicorns
  FROM companies_industries ci
  JOIN companies_dates cd ON ci.company_id = cd.company_id
  WHERE cd.date_joined >= '2019-01-01' AND cd.date_joined <= '2021-12-31'
  GROUP BY ci.industry, strftime('%Y', cd.date_joined)
),
top_industry AS (
  SELECT industry
  FROM industry_counts
  GROUP BY industry
  ORDER BY SUM(new_unicorns) DESC
  LIMIT 1
)

    ci.industry,
    cd.year_founded,
    COUNT(*) AS yearly_count

  JOIN companies_dates cd ON ci.company_id = cd.company_id

),

    industry,

final.sql:
WITH industry_counts AS (
  SELECT 
    ci.industry,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE cd.year_founded BETWEEN 2019 AND 2021) AS new_companies_count
  FROM companies_industries ci
  JOIN companies_dates cd ON ci.company_id = cd.company_id
  WHERE cd.year_founded BETWEEN 2019 AND 2021
  GROUP BY ci.industry
  ORDER BY new_companies_count DESC
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT 
  CAST(new_companies_count AS REAL) / 3 AS avg_new_per_year
FROM industry_counts;
